raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a bookcase from XXXX. XXXX never delivered the product. There was no proof of delivery or signature signed. However, when dispute was filed with Amex, they sided with merchant and didn't resolve the dispute nor provided proof of delivery. They said it was marked as delivered even though there was no photographic evidence or any signature. It showed on the tracking that it was delivered without signature. However, Amex did not look through any evidence and system seems to automatically declined dispute. They also did not allow to escalate to upper management showing lack of transparency and customer protection. Card was advertised with purchase protection in case of loss or thef but they did not follow what they advertised.
